title: Elon Musk and Sam Altman spar on X after Apple files OpenAI lawsuit
summary: Sam Altman responded to criticism from Elon Musk on X (formerly Twitter), attributing the attack to tensions around a recent OpenAI model release. The conflict underscores ongoing disputes between the two technology figures over AI development and their competing interests.
content: Sam Altman insisted that Elon Musk was again obsessed with him because of an OpenAI model release earlier this week.

zh.title: 苹果起诉OpenAI后，埃隆·马斯克与萨姆·奥特曼在X上争执
zh.summary: 萨姆·奥特曼回应了埃隆·马斯克在X（前称Twitter）上的批评，将这次攻击归咎于围绕最近OpenAI模型发布的紧张关系。这场冲突强调了这两位科技人物在人工智能开发及其竞争利益方面的持续纠纷。

title: As five big U.S. banks report earnings on the same day, Citigroup is the one to watch
summary: Five major U.S. banks are reporting earnings simultaneously, with Citigroup positioned as the focal point due to expected significant improvement in a key metric. However, despite the progress, Citigroup remains distant from achieving its internal performance targets.
content: Among the largest U.S. banks, Citigroup is expected to show the greatest improvement by one important measure. But it still has a long way to go to reach its own performance target.

zh.title: 五家美国大银行同一天报告财报时，花旗集团是关注的焦点
zh.summary: 五家大型美国银行同时报告财报，由于预期在关键指标上有显著改善，花旗集团成为关注的焦点。然而，尽管取得了进展，花旗集团距离实现其内部业绩目标仍有很大差距。

title: Here are the 3 big things we're watching in the stock market this week
summary: The stock market faces intense scrutiny this week as bank earnings reports and inflation data dominate investor attention. These key economic indicators will shape investor sentiment and potentially influence market direction.
content: The state of the U.S. economy is in focus across bank earnings and inflation data.

zh.title: 这是我们本周在股市中关注的3个重要事项
zh.summary: 随着银行财报和通胀数据主导投资者关注，股市本周面临密切审视。这些关键经济指标将影响投资者情绪，并可能影响市场方向。

title: Earnings estimates have been following an unusual pattern this time around
summary: Analysts have historically lowered earnings estimates in the months before results, but this cycle has defied that trend due to strength in energy and technology sectors. Heading into second-quarter earnings, analyst expectations have actually climbed rather than declined.
content: Analysts generally lower their estimates in the months before earnings. But thanks to the energy and tech sectors, expectations have actually climbed heading into second-quarter results.

zh.title: 收益预期这次呈现出不寻常的走势
zh.summary: 分析师历来在财报发布前几个月会下调盈利预期，但由于能源和科技板块的强势表现，这个周期打破了这一趋势。在第二季度财报期间，分析师的预期实际上上升而非下降。

title: Student loan borrowers on new RAP plan can lose key benefits if they pay even one day late
summary: The new Repayment Assistance Plan offers federal student loan borrowers enhanced benefits with a critical caveat: even a single late payment results in loss of benefits. Borrowers must adhere to strict payment deadlines to maintain eligibility.
content: The new Repayment Assistance Plan, or RAP, offers benefits to federal student loan borrowers — but only if their bill is paid on time. Here's what to know.

zh.title: 参加新还款援助计划的学生贷款借款人即使迟付一天也会失去关键福利
zh.summary: 新的还款援助计划为联邦学生贷款借款人提供增强的福利，但有一个关键警告：即使一次迟付也会导致失去福利。借款人必须遵守严格的付款期限以保持资格。

title: The No. 1 decision for aging retirees: Stay at home or move into a senior community?
summary: Retirees face a pivotal decision between remaining in established homes or relocating to senior communities, with significant lifestyle and financial considerations at stake. Staying in longtime residences requires extensive planning to ensure adequate support and safety.
content: Why staying in your longtime home requires more planning than you think.

zh.title: 老年退休人员的首要决定：留在家里还是搬到养老社区？
zh.summary: 退休人员面临一个关键决定，是留在自己建立好的房子里还是迁往养老社区，涉及重大的生活方式和财务考虑。留在长期居住的地方需要大量规划以确保充分的支持和安全。

title: The stock-market rally now hinges more on AI than oil
summary: Stock market gains are increasingly driven by AI investment rather than traditional oil/energy factors as earnings season begins, indicating a significant shift in investor focus and market drivers.
content: As earnings season kicks off, AI investment remains front and center.

zh.title: 股票市场涨势现在更多取决于人工智能而非石油
zh.summary: 随着财报季开始，股市涨幅越来越多地由人工智能投资而非传统石油/能源因素推动，表明投资者关注点和市场驱动力发生了重大转变。

title: Majority of U.S. workers support an AI wealth fund as tech layoffs surge, survey finds
summary: A recent survey shows that a majority of U.S. workers support establishing an AI sovereign wealth fund to hold tech corporations accountable amid rising tech sector layoffs.
content: A majority of U.S. employees now want an AI sovereign wealth fund to hold corporations more accountable, according to a recent survey, as tech layoffs rise.

zh.title: 调查发现：美国多数工人支持建立人工智能财富基金，科技裁员激增
zh.summary: 最近的调查显示，在科技行业裁员增加的背景下，美国大多数工人支持建立人工智能主权财富基金，以对科技公司进行监督。

title: Typhoon Bavi batters eastern China, threatens days of heavy rain
summary: Typhoon Bavi, weakened to tropical storm status, threatens eastern and northern China with multiple days of heavy rainfall as the system moves through the region.
content: Bavi had weakened to a tropical storm, but forecasters warned that the system could unleash widespread rain across eastern and northern China.

zh.title: 台风巴蔚肆虐华东，威胁数日暴雨
zh.summary: 已减弱为热带风暴的台风巴蔚威胁华东和华北地区数日暴雨，该系统正在穿过该地区。

title: I've studied more than 200 kids: Parents whose kids still confide in them as adults do 7 things early on
summary: Research analyzing over 200 parent-child relationships identifies seven key early-childhood habits that enable open communication between parents and their adult children throughout their lives.
content: After studying more than 200 parent-child relationships, parenting expert Reem Raouda shares the habits that help kids feel comfortable talking to their parents — from childhood through adulthood.

zh.title: 我研究了200多个孩子：父母与成年子女保持坦诚沟通需在早期做好7件事
zh.summary: 对200多个亲子关系的研究发现了七个关键的早期童年习惯，这些习惯能使父母与成年子女在一生中保持开放沟通。

title: Top Wall Street analysts are confident about these 3 stocks for the long haul
summary: Wall Street analysts have identified three stocks they recommend for long-term investment, offering guidance for investors navigating current market volatility and uncertainty.
content: Those looking for attractive stock picks amid the ongoing volatility can gain key insights by tracking the recommendations of top Wall Street analysts.

zh.title: 华尔街顶级分析师看好这3只股票的长期前景
zh.summary: 华尔街分析师确定了三只他们推荐长期投资的股票，为在当前市场波动和不确定性中的投资者提供指导。

title: Goldman Sachs picks its favorite Chinese AI models
summary: Goldman Sachs released a competitive positioning framework assessing Chinese AI models, providing the investment bank's assessment of the competitive landscape in China's artificial intelligence sector.
content: The investment bank released its Chinese AI model competitive positioning framework on Friday.

zh.title: 高盛精选其最看好的中国AI模型
zh.summary: 高盛发布了一个评估中国AI模型的竞争定位框架，提供了该投资银行对中国人工智能领域竞争格局的评估。

title: Earnings playbook: Reporting season gets underway with JPMorgan Chase, Netflix on deck
summary: Earnings season officially kicks off this week with major companies including JPMorgan Chase and Netflix reporting quarterly results, while nearly 28 S&P 500 companies are scheduled to announce earnings.
content: Nearly 28 S&P 500 companies are set to report earnings this week.

zh.title: 财报季战术指南：摩根大通和Netflix即将报告季度业绩
zh.summary: 财报季本周正式开启，摩根大通和Netflix等主要公司公布季度业绩，同时近28家标普500指数成分股预定发布财报。

title: Senator Lindsey Graham has died after a brief illness, his office says
summary: Republican Senator Lindsey Graham from South Carolina has died after a brief illness at age 71. His death marks the loss of a prominent figure in US politics.
content: Graham, a prominent Republican senator from South Carolina, was 71.

zh.title: 参议员林赛·格雷厄姆在短期疾病后去世，其办公室称
zh.summary: 来自南卡罗来州的共和党参议员林赛·格雷厄姆在短期疾病后去世，享年71岁。他的去世标志着美国政界失去了一位杰出人物。

title: Londoners face hidden poverty premium, study says
summary: A study reveals that low-income households in London face an additional annual burden of over £600 simply to access standard goods and services. The findings highlight the hidden costs of poverty in expensive urban areas.
content: Low-income households in London are facing an additional burden of over £600 a year simply to access standard goods and services.

zh.title: 伦敦人面临隐性贫困溢价，研究称
zh.summary: 一项研究揭示，伦敦低收入家庭仅为获得标准商品和服务就面临每年超过600英镑的额外负担。这些发现突显了在昂贵城市地区生活贫困的隐性成本。

title: How Aldi is taking on US supermarkets with its $4 almond butter
summary: German supermarket Aldi is investing $9 billion to expand aggressively in the US, targeting urban centers like Manhattan with its discount model. The expansion tests whether Aldi's pricing strategy can successfully compete against established players like Walmart.
content: The German supermarket's $9bn US push targets urban hubs like Manhattan. Can its discount model match Walmart?

zh.title: Aldi如何凭借其4美元杏仁酱对抗美国超市
zh.summary: 德国超市Aldi正投资90亿美元在美国扩张，以其折扣模式针对曼哈顿等城市中心。这次扩张测试Aldi的定价策略是否能与沃尔玛等老牌企业成功竞争。

title: ‘Almost unlimited’: Execs says AI demand remains strong even as enterprises move to ‘valuemaxxing’
summary: Executives report that demand for AI remains strong even as enterprises shift focus toward "valuemaxxing"—maximizing returns on AI investments. The comments suggest robust enterprise AI spending continues despite volatility in chip-related stocks.
content: AI-related chip stocks have been volatile amid a debate over AI demand and spending.

zh.title: "几乎无限"：高管称尽管企业转向"价值最大化"，人工智能需求仍然强劲
zh.summary: 高管表示，尽管企业将重点转向"价值最大化"（最大化人工智能投资回报），但人工智能需求仍然强劲。这些评论表明，尽管芯片相关股票波动，但企业人工智能支出仍在继续。

title: U.S. launches airstrikes against Iran after Tehran attacks container ship in Hormuz, Pentagon says
summary: The U.S. military launched airstrikes against Iran following Tehran's attack on a container ship in the Strait of Hormuz, according to Pentagon statements. Iran has been attacking vessels using a southern route protected by U.S. military forces and is demanding they instead transit through a northern corridor controlled by Iran. The escalation underscores rising tensions over control of a critical global shipping lane.
content: Iran has attacked ships using a route along Oman's coast protected by the U.S. military. Tehran demands vessels use a northern route through its waters.

zh.title: 美国对伊朗发动空袭，五角大楼称伊朗在霍尔木兹海峡攻击集装箱船
zh.summary: 美国军方对伊朗发动空袭，此前德黑兰在霍尔木兹海峡攻击了一艘集装箱船，五角大楼发表声明称。伊朗一直在攻击通过由美国军事力量保护的南部路线的船只，并要求他们改为通过由伊朗控制的北部走廊。这一升级加剧了对这一关键全球航道控制权的紧张局势。
